heading: Planetary Tripwires
info: Abrupt shifts are hidden in historical ice cores.
text: Robust indicators of critical slowing down were found in ice cores before the Younger Dryas—the most dramatic climate shift in Earth's history.

heading: Tipping Cascades
info: Greenland ice loss triggers a global domino effect.
text: Crossing one threshold, like the Greenland Ice Sheet at 1.5 degrees, can trigger a cascade of tipping points across the entire planet.

heading: Shallowing Basins
info: Earth's climate is losing its ability to recover.
text: As the Earth's climate basin of attraction shallows, recovery from small perturbations slows down. This signal is already in the satellite data.

heading: The Warning Clock
info: Satellite data shows a complex system losing its grip.
text: The planet is telling us exactly how much grip it has left. The question is whether we've built the tools to listen.
